videos.description: Kentucky WR Garrett Johnson makes a 39 yard pass for a first down and follows it up with a spectacular one-handed grab that's reminiscent of Randall Cobb.

videos.headline: Stanley Williams goes long distance
videos.description: Kentucky RB Stanley Williams is nearly stuffed in the backfield, but instead breaks a tackle and romped 60 yards before being brought down inside the 5. Williams scored two plays later to tie the game against Auburn at 7-7.
